context.summary: Narrowed CSRF exemption for /api/storefront and /api/apps routes from all-methods to GET-only. Added requireStorefrontApiKey middleware to POST /api/storefront/checkout — when STOREFRONT_API_KEY env var is set, callers must include X-Api-Key header. POST /api/storefront/fulfill was already excluded from CSRF via csrfExcludePaths with HMAC webhook signature verification. Added STOREFRONT_API_KEY to .env.example with description.
